infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to camera to capture medical images for analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to microphone for audio messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to photo library to select medical images for analysis.
